description_long: This kiosk consists of three adjacent basketball arcade machines, each with a distinct theme and signage above the backboard. The left unit features a pink, pillow-like sign reading 'HYPE ZOMBISM', the center unit has a white and teal sign reading 'DATA CENTERED', and the right unit displays a green and white sign reading 'GREEN WASHING' with a grid pattern. Each machine has a blue base, a metal frame, a basketball hoop with a net, and a backboard with thematic graphics. The frames are colored differently—copper, black, and green—matching their respective themes. The overall structure is open, with visible support bars and no enclosed walls, doors, or windows.
description: A trio of themed basketball arcade kiosks with colorful signage, blue bases, and open metal frames, each featuring a unique backboard design and hoop.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three basketball arcade machines, their themed signage, hoops, and blue bases clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the machines, the alignment of the hoops, and the thinness of the frames.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the signage, the support structures, and the backs of the blue bases.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the side profiles of the frames, hoops, and the signage from a different angle.
attribute_signage_type: Printed signs above each backboard, with large thematic text: 'HYPE ZOMBISM', 'DATA CENTERED', and 'GREEN WASHING'.
attribute_roof_design: Flat, open-topped with signage panels as the highest elements, no overhangs or awnings.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern, arcade-inspired with playful and thematic visual elements.
